hyperedges.label: Training Preset Tier Groups (Team / Youth / Advanced)
Coach Planning Workflow (Question → Chips → Presets → Build)

nodes.label: Coach-first basketball practice planner (V1)
nodes.rationale: One question, multi-select chips/presets, printable practice sheet for sideline use—not CRM or long forms.

nodes.label: SYSTEM_PROMPT.md as agent source of truth
nodes.norm_label: system_prompt.md as agent source of truth

nodes.label: Permanent coach-first UI contract
nodes.rationale: Single main input, 12 quick chips, grouped presets, collapsed More tags, Build merges to API—must not regress.

nodes.label: What are you working on today? (single textarea)
nodes.norm_label: what are you working on today? (single textarea)

nodes.label: Next.js 16 App Router + React 19 + Tailwind 4 + TypeScript
nodes.norm_label: next.js 16 app router + react 19 + tailwind 4 + typescript

nodes.label: npm run deploy (git add, commit, push)
nodes.rationale: Default end-of-agent workflow unless user opts out; Vercel deploys main.
nodes.norm_label: npm run deploy (git add, commit, push)

nodes.label: changed practice data format (fixed commit message)
nodes.norm_label: changed practice data format (fixed commit message)

nodes.label: Product: Practice basketball planner for coaches
nodes.norm_label: product: practice basketball planner for coaches

nodes.label: Core loop: focus → practice sheet → sideline
nodes.norm_label: core loop: focus → practice sheet → sideline

nodes.label: Dark minimal UI (bg #09090b, zinc borders)
nodes.rationale: No gradients or fancy animations unless requested; avoids old full-red debug background.

nodes.label: Explicit language picker (en, he, es, de)
nodes.rationale: Do not infer UI language from typed text alone; persist in localStorage practice-ui-locale.
nodes.norm_label: explicit language picker (en, he, es, de)

nodes.label: Agent constraints (minimal diffs, no V2 scope creep)
nodes.rationale: Keep coach-first UI; change copy in uiCatalog only; read SYSTEM_STRUCTURE before domain changes.
nodes.norm_label: agent constraints (minimal diffs, no v2 scope creep)

nodes.label: V1 flow: coach focus → AI practice → sideline
nodes.norm_label: v1 flow: coach focus → ai practice → sideline

nodes.label: V2 vision: team identity, roster, player missions
nodes.rationale: Future scope—team offensive/defensive style, problems, goals, roster tags—not V1 unless user asks.
nodes.norm_label: v2 vision: team identity, roster, player missions

nodes.label: Basketball-only sub-agent scope
nodes.rationale: Owns coaching intelligence and product copy paths; not Next.js plumbing, deploy, or generic UI.

nodes.label: Drill copy fields (objective, setup, execution, points)
nodes.norm_label: drill copy fields (objective, setup, execution, points)

nodes.label: Practice flow intelligence (7-phase structure)
nodes.rationale: Activation → teach → guided reps → compete → game-like → embedded conditioning → cooldown; avoid lines and dead time.

nodes.label: Coach communication style (concise, direct)
nodes.rationale: Avoid generic AI, corporate wording, motivational fluff; prefer short imperatives.

nodes.label: Drill must answer: objective, setup, execution, points, mistakes, progression
nodes.norm_label: drill must answer: objective, setup, execution, points, mistakes, progression

nodes.label: Competitive layer in V1 drill copy
nodes.norm_label: competitive layer in v1 drill copy

nodes.norm_label: brand logo (orange basketball icon + ai basketball planner)
